raw: There are two types of NBWM Passes: 1.) Coupon Pass - Provides free admission for 1 person This is a non-returnable coupon pass that must be picked up at the Main Library Circulation Desk after it is reserved. It can be used anytime before the expiration date. 2.) Circulating Pass - Admits up to four people at 50% off the cost of admission This is a circulating pass that must be checked out and returned to the library. Instructions will be emailed to you upon reservation.
